title: Punishment for Murder
description: Whoever commits murder shall be punished with death or imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine

title: Voluntarily causing hurt
description: Punishment up to 1 year or fine up to 10,000 rupees or both

title: Theft
description: Whoever dishonestly takes movable property out of possession of any person without consent

title: Criminal intimidation
description: Threatening injury to person, reputation or property
